focus: stabilization — replay all nine active P1s and one P2 against current anchors, consumers, negative tests, frozen specs, and operator surfaces without artificial novelty

findingDetails.title: A worker crash permanently strands a vector job in running
findingDetails.detail: A process exit after claim leaves the vector job permanently unselectable in normal operation.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Current exact search finds no lease or stale-running reconciliation; adjacent tests omit process interruption.

adjudication.claim: A process exit after a vector job is claimed leaves it permanently unselectable during normal drains and unchanged scans.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched for leases, stale-running reset, startup reconciliation, and process-interruption coverage; none exists.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Explicit projection rebuild can recover, but normal operation does not invoke it.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Bounded stale-claim reconciliation plus a process-interruption regression test.

findingDetails.title: Persistent queries ignore an explicitly requested generation
findingDetails.detail: The persistent query path silently substitutes the current generation for a caller-supplied generationHash.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Current search finds generation pin enforcement for cursors and hydration but not direct queries.

adjudication.claim: Direct persistent queries ignore a caller-supplied generationHash.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched current query, adapter, hydration, and tests for direct-query mismatch handling; none exists.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Current-only query semantics are possible but are not documented as an exception to the frozen contract.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Contract amendment or enforced/tested requested-generation semantics.

findingDetails.title: The generation pointer accepts a symlinked database outside its publication directory
findingDetails.detail: A basename-only pointer can resolve through a symlink outside the generation directory and is not bound to its declared generation hash.
findingDetails.scopeProof: The single pointer resolver still lacks reader-side realpath containment and hash binding; adjacent tests cover ordinary files only.

adjudication.claim: The published pointer can select an escaping symlink and is not bound to the database generation.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched current resolver/writer/tests for pointer realpath containment, symlink negatives, and hash binding; none exists.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Locked-down directory permissions can reduce exploitability.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Proven immutable boundary or enforced/tested realpath containment and hash binding.

findingDetails.title: Persistent retrieval accepts arbitrarily large query vectors
findingDetails.detail: The synchronous persistent query path accepts and duplicates an unbounded caller-controlled queryVector.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Current query validation remains finite/non-empty only; the output cap does not protect query inputs and tests use two dimensions.

adjudication.claim: The synchronous persistent query path accepts and duplicates an unbounded queryVector.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched all query vector bounds and negative tests; only embedder output is capped.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Current local callers may provide small vectors, reducing immediate exposure.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Enforced upstream or query-side dimensions/byte cap before fingerprinting, with tests.

findingDetails.title: Phase 001 marks a ten-iteration research task complete after only seven iterations
findingDetails.detail: Phase 001 marks a ten-iteration task complete while the handoff records seven iterations and a stall closure.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Current task/checklist/handoff/parent evidence still agrees on seven except the checked execution claim.

adjudication.claim: Checked phase-001 evidence claims ten completed iterations while authoritative evidence records seven.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched current packet evidence for a continuation or amended task meaning; none exists.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Ten could be a ceiling, but the checked task is phrased as executed.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Reconciled checked evidence with a cited legal stop.

findingDetails.title: Phase 002 checks both research lineages complete although GLM produced zero iterations
findingDetails.detail: Phase 002 checks both lineages complete and converged although GLM produced zero iterations and synthesis is SOL-only.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Frozen requirements and current checked rows still contradict the GLM=0 handoff.

adjudication.claim: Checked phase-002 evidence claims two-lineage completion although GLM failed before iteration one.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched current packet evidence for successful GLM output or an amended optional-lineage rule; none exists.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: SOL is self-sufficient, but that does not amend frozen two-lineage requirements.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Amended requirements/checked rows or real GLM merge evidence.

findingDetails.title: Phase 003 claims a corpus-scale SLO was measured from a 20-style fixture
findingDetails.detail: Phase 003 marks the corpus-scale SLO proven although its sole timing fixture contains twenty styles and the handoff defers the full-corpus check.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Current exact search finds timingStyles(20) and no 1,290-style persistent benchmark.

adjudication.claim: A 20-style timing test is overstated as same-corpus full-scale SLO proof.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched current DB tests for full-corpus timing evidence; only the 20-style fixture exists.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: The bounded test is useful regression evidence but does not satisfy the frozen SLO.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Same-full-corpus measurements or accurate deferred SLO claims.

findingDetails.title: The parent declares the four-phase program complete and verified while required evidence is false
findingDetails.detail: The parent still declares all phases built and verified despite contradicted child evidence and active P1 findings.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Current parent metadata and handoff gates remain inconsistent with stabilized child evidence.

adjudication.claim: The parent Complete status is unsupported while mandatory child evidence is contradicted and active P1s remain.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Reconciled current parent language with child evidence and reran 20 focused tests; delivery is green in areas but all claimed verification evidence is not.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Complete may mean delivered, but the parent explicitly says built and verified.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Reconciled evidence/defects or lifecycle language distinguishing delivery from verification.

findingDetails.title: Persistent DB maintenance has no owned operator surface or bounded generation-retention path
findingDetails.detail: Persistent publication, rollback, vector repair, and drain remain library/test-only while immutable generations have no prune policy.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Current export/consumer and prune searches find no production owner, runbook, or bounded generation cleanup.

adjudication.claim: Persistent DB publication/repair are library-only and repeated builds retain generations without bounded pruning.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Repeated current consumer and prune/retention searches across code, CLI, README, and tests; none exists.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Deployments can script exports and legacy remains default, but this is not an owned tested operator contract.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Documented/tested operator lifecycle plus a safe retention/pruning invariant.

findingDetails.title: The aggregate hash includes the mutable slug locator
findingDetails.detail: Artifact relativePath includes slug and is hashed, so locator-only renames rotate generation identity.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Current aggregate-hash and artifact-path producers remain unchanged; retrieval hash is separate.

traceabilityChecks.summary: Stabilization direct reads confirm all implementation/contract gaps and frozen evidence contradictions remain.
Stabilization direct reads confirm false checked evidence remains in phases 001-003 and parent completion remains unsupported.

noveltyJustification: Mandatory stabilization reproduced the existing P0=0, P1=9, P2=1 active baseline. No new or refined severity weight was claimed; all ten root causes, hashes, and fix boundaries were preserved.
edgeCases: Graph/structural impact unavailable; cited graphless fallback used.
Green 20/20 focused tests omit every active bug class's missing negative case.
Legacy default contains immediate persistent-path exposure.
Rollback needs one prior generation; absence of a bounded keep/prune policy is the defect.
All ten active findings retain distinct root causes and fix boundaries.
Unrelated dirty workspace paths were not modified.
ruledOut: collapse of crash recovery into operator maintenance
green focused tests resolve missing negative cases

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Mandatory stabilization spans persistent storage, vector jobs, query/hydration consumers, operator CLI/docs, frozen phase evidence, and parent release status.

selectedTargets: negative DB tests for each implementation bug class
operator maintenance and generation retention surfaces
targetSelection.selectionReason: The rendered stabilization prompt requires replaying every active finding, deduplicating root causes, preserving frozen specifications, and rechecking operator maintenance.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Normal operation recovers a durable running vector claim after worker death.

searchActions.queryOrPath: running claim, stale lease/reset, process interruption
searchActions.result: No recovery path or process-death test; explicit rebuild only.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Direct query honors a caller generation pin consistently with hydration.

searchActions.result: Hydration and cursors enforce identity; direct query does not.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Published pointer readers contain real paths and bind declared generation identity.

searchActions.result: Reader remains basename-only; no symlink/hash-binding test.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Caller query vectors are bounded before serialization and copying.

searchActions.result: Only embedder output is capped; query tests use two dimensions.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Aggregate identity excludes mutable slug locators.
Checked ten-iteration execution evidence matches authoritative lineage state.

searchActions.result: Checked ten remains contradicted by authoritative seven.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Checked two-lineage convergence is supported by both lineage artifacts.

searchActions.queryOrPath: SOL, GLM, both lineages, zero iterations
searchActions.result: Frozen requirement/checks remain contradicted by GLM=0.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Checked same-corpus SLO proof uses the full style corpus.

searchActions.result: Only timingStyles(20) exists and handoff defers corpus scale.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Parent built-and-verified status is supported by all child evidence and active gates.

searchActions.queryOrPath: parent status/handoff against stabilized child findings
searchActions.result: Parent remains complete+verified while required evidence remains contradicted.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Persistent maintenance has one owned operator surface and bounded retention.

searchActions.result: Exports remain internal/test-only; CLI/runbook/prune policy absent.

evidence: Cited direct reads, exact searches, producer/consumer traces, and negative-test inspection covered every required active bug class.

reason: Current evidence reproduced the existing ten active root causes without a new or refined finding.
Crash recovery and operator maintenance remain distinct automatic-recovery versus owned-lifecycle fix boundaries.
